name_en: 【LV Premium Full Steel - Changeable Chip Version - With Full Set】
name_cn:
【LV Premium Full Steel - Changeable Chip Version - With Full Set】
【Item No.】M82949
【Intro】 The Hills Pochette clutch is crafted from Monogram Denim canvas made from certified denim cotton, with a sand-washed texture highlighting clean lines.
Adjustable shoulder strap for short shoulder carrying, the exquisite structure can hold an iPhone, card slots, lipstick, and keys.
20.5 x 6 x 16cm (L x H x W)
